gene_symbols.description: List of gene symbols, in a yaml array

gene_model_pub_name.description: Gene identifier used in the publication

gene_model_full_id.description: Gene model name from LIS datastore, with prefix; form gensp.Strain.gnm#.ann#.geneID

confidence.description: Integer between 1 and 5, with 5 indicating rigorous validation; 1 and 2 low confidence, and avoided

curators.description: Name(s) of one or more curators, in a yaml array

comments.description: Comments explaining key aspects of the biology or curation, in a yaml array

phenotype_synopsis.description: Short description of the phenotypic effect of the gene (mutant or over expression)

references.description: Array of citations with sub-array of doi and pmid

citation.description: String with format 'Author, Author et al., YEAR', 'Author, Author, YEAR', or 'Author, YEAR'

doi.description: DOI pointing to the dataset; NOTE this is NOT a URI!

traits.description: List of traits associated with this gene

entity_name.description: Human-readable name of ontology term, e.g., 'defense response to nematode'

entity.description: Ontology accession with format 'NS:###', where NS is the namespace, e.g. TO or GO

relation_name.description: Human-readable name of ontology term, e.g., 'defense response to nematode'

relation.description: Ontology accession with format 'RO:###', where RO is the relation ontology
